case_title: SARAH JEAN MARTINELLI VS. HERBERT SOLAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,565.00 FILED BY MARTINELLI, SARAH JEAN AS TO DEFENDANT SOLAS, HERBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINELLI, SARAH JEAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE. SERVED AUG-09-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOLAS, HERBERT
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MARTINELLI, SARAH JEAN SOLAS, HERBERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SARAH JEAN MARTINELLI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HERBERT SOLAS IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINELLI, SARAH JEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLAS, HERBERT $1,152.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,152.00, PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HER BURDEN TO SHOW DEFENDANT CAUSED DAMAGES CLAIMED. DEFENDANT SUBMITTED EVIDENCE HE ATTEMPTED TO ADDRESS PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINTS. DEFENDANT CONCEDED. THERE IS NO CERTIFICATE OF OCCUPANCY, BUT PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUBMIT EVIDENCE OF RENT ACTUALLY PAID PAST MARCH 2024. PLAINTIFF MAY RECOVER RENT PAID SEPT 2023 -FEB. 2024 (6 MONTHS X $192) ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
